Product support

Add to your order

  • Coverage for accidental damage including drops, spills, and broken parts, as well as breakdowns (plans vary)
  • 24/7 support when you need it
  • Quick, easy, and frustration-free claims
Cover this product:

Learn more
3-Year Office Equipment Protection Plan
from Asurion, LLC
4.2 838
  • No Additional Cost: You pay nothing for repairs – parts, labor, and shipping included.
  • Coverage: Plan starts on the date of purchase. Malfunctions covered after the manufacturer's warranty. Power surges covered from day one. Real experts are available 24/7 to help with set-up, connectivity issues, troubleshooting and much more.
  • Easy Claims Process: File a claim anytime online or by phone. Most claims approved within minutes. If we can’t repair it, we’ll send you an Amazon e-gift card for the purchase price of your covered product or replace it.
  • Product Eligibility: Plan must be purchased with a product or within 30 days of the product purchase. Pre-existing conditions are not covered.
  • Terms & Details: More information about this protection plan is available within the “Product guides and documents” section. Simply click “User Guide” for more info. Terms & Conditions will be available in Your Orders on Amazon. Asurion will also email your plan confirmation with Terms & Conditions to the address associated with your Amazon account within 24 hours of purchase.

Complete Protect: One simple plan covers all eligible past & future Amazon Purchases
from Asurion, LLC
4.1 8582
  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • PAST AND FUTURE PROTECTION: Covers malfunctions and failures, plus drops or spills for eligible portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • TRUSTED CYBERSECURITY: Digital security with scam detection for emails and texts.
  • EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at www.asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME: Up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout don’t renew monthly).

Product Protection by Asurion, LLC

  • No Additional Cost: You pay nothing for repairs – parts, labor, and shipping included.
  • Coverage: Plan starts on the date of purchase. Malfunctions covered after the manufacturer's warranty. Power surges covered from day one. Real experts are available 24/7 to help with set-up, connectivity issues, troubleshooting and much more.
  • Easy Claims Process: File a claim anytime online or by phone. Most claims approved within minutes. If we can’t repair it, we’ll send you an Amazon e-gift card for the purchase price of your covered product or replace it.
  • Product Eligibility: Plan must be purchased with a product or within 30 days of the product purchase. Pre-existing conditions are not covered.
  • Terms & Details: More information about this protection plan is available within the “Product guides and documents” section. Simply click “User Guide” for more info. Terms & Conditions will be available in Your Orders on Amazon. Asurion will also email your plan confirmation with Terms & Conditions to the address associated with your Amazon account within 24 hours of purchase.

Product Protection by Asurion, LLC

  • BEST VALUE: Protect all your eligible Amazon purchases including: tech, tools, appliances, furniture and more. All for one low monthly price.
  • PAST AND FUTURE PROTECTION: Covers malfunctions and failures, plus drops or spills for eligible portable items. Protection begins immediately for eligible purchases from the past 90 days, plus all eligible future purchases (products used commercially are excluded).
  • TRUSTED CYBERSECURITY: Digital security with scam detection for emails and texts.
  • EASY CLAIMS: File in minutes at www.asurion.com/amazon for fast repair or reimbursement - up to the purchase price.
  • NO HIDDEN FEES. CANCEL ANYTIME: Up to $5,000 in total claims per 12-month period. Your plan renews monthly until canceled (coupons applied at checkout don’t renew monthly).

ENERGY STAR

ENERGY STAR

Products that earn the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency’s ENERGY STAR label are independently certified to use less energy than standard models, reducing carbon pollution associated with energy generation and lowering your energy bill. For more information, visit energystar.gov.

The monthly payment shown is for this item only and does not include the cost of other items or add-ons in your cart.
See order total amount (including shipping cost, tax, other items in cart and add-ons) at checkout.
Learn more about 12 equal monthly payments with 0% APR on your Prime Visa
  • When a cart qualifies for multiple financing options, the longest term option will be applied by default at checkout.
  • The monthly payment amount ($21.67/mo) is estimated and may change when shipping and tax is applied. No interest will be charged for this financing offer. Any balance remaining after the promotional period ends will accrue interest at your standard Purchase APR.
  • When your order ships, the entire purchase amount will be charged to your card and deducted from your available credit. Check your statement for the amount due each month.
See terms and conditions > See terms and conditions of Prime Visa
Learn more about pay 3 equal monthly payments with your Chase Credit Card
  • When a cart qualifies for multiple financing options, the longest option will be displayed. See other financing options at checkout.
  • The monthly payment amount is estimated and may change when shipping and tax is applied.
  • When your order ships, the entire purchase amount will be charged to your card and deducted from your available credit. Check your statement for the amount due each month.
    You'll make equal monthly payments for the duration of the plan and the amount will be added to your Chase credit card's minimum payment due each month.
    Your plan will be pending and no payments will be due until the start of the next billing cycle. You'll continue to earn any existing card rewards.
    You'll be able to access all payment plans from the Chase Pay Over Time dashboard on Chase.com or the Chase Mobile app.
    If you’ve set your account to pay your statement balance automatically each month, Chase will update your automatic payment setting to "interest-saving balance" once your payment plan request is confirmed. Keep in mind, if you place multiple orders during the same billing cycle with the same plan terms (APR and payment duration), your automatic payment setting may only be updated with the first order. This option allows you to continue avoiding interest on new purchases and also pay your monthly payments for your Chase Pay Over Time®plans set up at checkout.
See terms and conditions > See terms and conditions of Chase Credit Card
Learn more about 4 equal bi-weekly payments at 0% APR pay over time with Affirm
  • Enter a few piece of information for a real-time decision. This check doesn't affect your credit score.
  • Your first payment may be due today.
  • Make your payment at affirm.com or in the Affirm app. You'll get reminders when a payment's coming up.
  • Your rate will be 10-36% APR based on credit. 0% APR options may be available on specific items and/or during limited time promotions. For example, a $300 purchase could be split into 12 monthly payments of $27.79 at 20% APR. Options depend on your purchase, and a down payment may be required, which will not exceed 50% of the total purchase amount (including taxes, shipping, or any add-on charges). Payment options through Affirm are subject to an eligibility check, may not be available everywhere, and are provided by these lending partners: affirm.com/lenders. For licenses and disclosures, including information for New Mexico residents, see affirm.com/licenses. CA residents: Loans by Affirm Loan Services, LLC are made or arranged pursuant to a California Finance Lender license
Learn more > See terms and conditions of Affirm Card

    You'll be able to access all payment plans from the Chase Pay Over Time dashboard on Chase.com or the Chase Mobile app.
    If you’ve set your account to pay your statement balance automatically each month, Chase will update your automatic payment setting to "interest-saving balance" once your payment plan request is confirmed. Keep in mind, if you place multiple orders during the same billing cycle with the same plan terms (APR and payment duration), your automatic payment setting may only be updated with the first order. This option allows you to continue avoiding interest on new purchases and also pay your monthly payments for your Chase Pay Over Time®plans set up at checkout.
See terms and conditions > See terms and conditions of Chase Credit Card
Learn more about 4 equal bi-weekly payments at 0% APR pay over time with Affirm
  • Enter a few piece of information for a real-time decision. This check doesn't affect your credit score.
  • Your first payment may be due today.
  • Make your payment at affirm.com or in the Affirm app. You'll get reminders when a payment's coming up.
  • Your rate will be 10-36% APR based on credit. 0% APR options may be available on specific items and/or during limited time promotions. For example, a $300 purchase could be split into 12 monthly payments of $27.79 at 20% APR. Options depend on your purchase, and a down payment may be required, which will not exceed 50% of the total purchase amount (including taxes, shipping, or any add-on charges). Payment options through Affirm are subject to an eligibility check, may not be available everywhere, and are provided by these lending partners: affirm.com/lenders. For licenses and disclosures, including information for New Mexico residents, see affirm.com/licenses. CA residents: Loans by Affirm Loan Services, LLC are made or arranged pursuant to a California Finance Lender license
Learn more > See terms and conditions of Affirm Card
Learn more about pay 6 equal monthly payments with your Chase Credit Card
  • When a cart qualifies for multiple financing options, the longest option will be displayed. See other financing options at checkout.
  • The monthly payment amount is estimated and may change when shipping and tax is applied.
  • When your order ships, the entire purchase amount will be charged to your card and deducted from your available credit. Check your statement for the amount due each month.
    You'll make equal monthly payments for the duration of the plan and the amount will be added to your Chase credit card's minimum payment due each month.
    Your plan will be pending and no payments will be due until the start of the next billing cycle. You'll continue to earn any existing card rewards.
    You'll be able to access all payment plans from the Chase Pay Over Time dashboard on Chase.com or the Chase Mobile app.
    If you’ve set your account to pay your statement balance automatically each month, Chase will update your automatic payment setting to "interest-saving balance" once your payment plan request is confirmed. Keep in mind, if you place multiple orders during the same billing cycle with the same plan terms (APR and payment duration), your automatic payment setting may only be updated with the first order. This option allows you to continue avoiding interest on new purchases and also pay your monthly payments for your Chase Pay Over Time®plans set up at checkout.
See terms and conditions > See terms and conditions of Chase Credit Card

Screen Surface Description Matte

About this item

  • VERSATILE MONITOR: 32 Inch 4K UHD (3840x2160p) MVA monitor with thin bezels and 60Hz refresh rate
  • HDR10 CONTENT SUPPORT: For deep contrast, rich color, and vibrant details
  • ENHANCED VIEWING COMFORT: Flicker-Free technology and Blue Light Filter for reduced eye fatigue
  • OPTIMIZED VIEW SETTINGS: Offers “Game,” “Movie,” “Web,” “Text,” and “Mono” presets
  • FLEXIBLE CONNECTIVITY: The VX3276-4K-MHD supports laptops, PCs, and Macs with HDMI, DisplayPort, and Mini DisplayPort inputs

From the manufacturer

ViewSonic VX3276-4K-MHD

A Modern Work of Art

Previous page

  1. Ultra-Slim Panel

    This VX3276-4K-MHD display features an ultra slim panel for a breathtaking viewing experience. A sleek design enables this monitor to blend seamlessly into any room.

  2. Stunning 4K Ultra HD Resolution

    With more than 8 million pixels and 4X the resolution of a Full HD monitor, this Ultra HD 3840x2160 monitor positions every pixel perfectly for breathtaking clarity.

  3. Frameless Design

    Enjoy more room to see what matters most. A frameless design provides a seamless viewing experience individually and in multi-monitor setups.

  4. MVA Panel Technology

    With MVA technology, this monitor delivers consistent, accurate images no matter which angle you’re looking at the screen.

Next page
Previous page

  1. Versatile Connectivity

    HDMI, DisplayPort and Mini DisplayPort inputs give you the freedom to connect your display to a variety of devices.

  2. Optimized View Settings

    ViewSonic’s unique ViewMode feature offers 'Game,' 'Movie,' 'Web,' 'Text,' and 'Mono' presets. Take your viewing experience to the next level no matter what you’re watching.

  3. Dual Integrated Speakers

    With dual integrated speakers, this monitor combines incredible screen performance with immersive stereo sound for a delightful audiovisual experience.

Next page
Previous page

  1. Eye Care

    Flicker-Free and Blue Light technology help reduce eye strain over extended periods.

  2. VESA Compatible Mount

    Easily install your monitor on a VESA-compatible wall mount or stand.

  3. HDR10 Content Support

    Experience an enhanced viewing experience and jaw-dropping colors with HDR support.

Next page

  • Can I connect my MacBook or iMac to the monitor?

    Yes, this monitor works with both MacBook and iMac. Before proceeding, please make sure that the connectivity ports on your MacBook or laptop are compatible with your ViewSonic monitor.

  • Does this monitor come with a built-in web camera?

    No. This monitor does not come with a web camera.

  • Is this monitor ergonomic?

    This monitor comes with tilt feature, but not pivot, swivel and height adjustment.

Product Description

The ViewSonic VX3276-4K-MHD is a sleek 32” (31 5" Viewable) 4K UHD monitor with a modern and minimalist style perfect for home use With Super clear MVA panel technology and 80M 1 Dynamic contrast Ratio This monitor offers best-in-class screen performance with ultra-wide viewing angles A sleek edge-to-edge frameless design combined with stunning 3840 x 2560 resolution provides incredibly sharp and detailed visuals while HDR10 content support delivers a high Dynamic Range of vivid color and contrast for incredible screen performance Versatile HDMI DisplayPort and Mini DisplayPort inputs offer flexible connectivity options for both computing and gaming while an exclusive view mode feature provides intuitive presets for optimized screen performance in different applications With view Sonic's industry-leading 3-year limited This monitor is a solid long-term investment that combines style and high performance for the home.

      This product has sustainability features recognized by trusted certifications.
      Energy efficiency
      Conserves energy compared to similar products.
      As certified by
      EPEAT

      EPEAT

      EPEAT certifies electronic products based on sustainability impacts across their life cycle including requirements for energy efficiency and end-of-life management. An EPEAT registered product can also meet optional more ambitious criteria including reduction of fluorinated greenhouse gases (F-GHGs). Products meeting 50% - 74% optional criteria are 'Silver' and those meeting 75% or more are 'Gold'.

      Learn more about this certification

      Discover more products with sustainability features. Learn more

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
    Click to learn more about this sponsored product
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers appreciate the monitor's appearance, describing it as beautiful for general computer use, and find it offers good value for money. The display quality receives mixed feedback, with some reporting dead pixels. The picture quality is bright and clear, though some are disappointed with it, and the color display shows excellent contrast but appears washed out to others. The monitor's reliability is concerning, with some reporting it stops working after a day or two, and while it works well with Mac devices, some mention compatibility issues with specific devices like the PS4.
    AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

    Select to learn more

    30 customers mention appearance, 26 positive, 4 negative30 customers mention "Appearance"26 positive4 negative
    Customers like the monitor's appearance, describing it as beautiful for general computer use, with one customer noting its stainless steel design and another mentioning its silvery metal finish.
    "I’ve had it for a couple weeks and am very happy. Nice looking monitor, good design and attachments at bottom I prefer since I wall mount it...." Read more
    "Works great. Looks great. Nice display. Mode select buttons could be better, but otherwise fine." Read more
    "...was bit different, Yes the computer regonised it as a 4k monitor and looks good, but 4 years from now how will look then, time only tell...." Read more
    "...Nice screen, good appearance, wonderful engineering on the desktop stand. Four minor hickies or this would have been a five start review...." Read more
    28 customers mention value for money, 23 positive, 5 negative28 customers mention "Value for money"23 positive5 negative
    Customers find the monitor offers good value for money, particularly as a cost-effective 4K display.
    "Been using this for a while and I'm very happy with it so far. Good value for the money, reliable and no real issues...." Read more
    "...Great monitor for the price. Perfect for home and work use. Not good for gaming but for everything else at this price for a 4K monitor it’s a bargain." Read more
    "...A reasonable monitor for the money." Read more
    "...On the other hand for the price point, web-surfing and office type work is great...." Read more
    70 customers mention display quality, 45 positive, 25 negative70 customers mention "Display quality"45 positive25 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the monitor's display quality, with some finding it fine and nice, while others report issues with dead pixels and poor quality control from ViewSonic.
    "...Other than that it has been a great monitor. Was hoping it would last a bit longer." Read more
    "This monitor leaves alot to be deired. It is a very washed out if viewed from the sides...." Read more
    "...Go back to older stands that could raise monitor up and down. Nice screen, good appearance, wonderful engineering on the desktop stand...." Read more
    "...This is a good monitor considering how little it costs (for a 32” 4K monitor that is)...." Read more
    69 customers mention picture quality, 48 positive, 21 negative69 customers mention "Picture quality"48 positive21 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the monitor's picture quality, with some praising its brightness and clarity while others express disappointment.
    "I mounted these and drive them off a 2021 MacBook Pro. Great picture!" Read more
    "...speak to its compatibility with the monitor arm I have and the picture quality. Both are 5 of 5. This 4k monitor is super slim and low profile...." Read more
    "white border appear sometimes,i dont know why,but it is sharp monitor indeed" Read more
    "Great picture quality but I regret that I didn't realize sooner that this monitor can't be paired with a remote...." Read more
    30 customers mention reliability, 15 positive, 15 negative30 customers mention "Reliability"15 positive15 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the monitor's reliability, with some reporting it works well and has no issues, while others mention that it stops working after a day or two, randomly turns off, and only lasts about two years.
    "Works great. Looks great. Nice display. Mode select buttons could be better, but otherwise fine." Read more
    "Screen came defective. A bottom portion of the brand new monitor was not displaying video and had dead lines all over." Read more
    "...Overall the screen seems to work well. The resolution is great! 2) HOWEVER ! ! !:..." Read more
    "it wasn't in good condition display is glitched I am returning for a refund" Read more
    26 customers mention color quality, 12 positive, 14 negative26 customers mention "Color quality"12 positive14 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the monitor's color quality, with some finding it good while others report that the colors are weak and washed out.
    "...This monitor does not have an HDR color feature. is you are referring to HD resolution that needs to be set from the computer...." Read more
    "...This is a great upgrade from that. Excellent contrast...." Read more
    "...from Windows 11, pretty much dulls and greys (washes out) the colors horribly...." Read more
    "...I am disappointed because I really like the bright and colorful screen on the 1440P model." Read more
    21 customers mention brightness, 13 positive, 8 negative21 customers mention "Brightness"13 positive8 negative
    Customers have mixed opinions about the monitor's brightness, with several noting that it isn't very bright, while one customer mentions that the anti-glare screen works perfectly in normal room lighting.
    "Display is sharp, bright, and color is perfect. This monitor is paired with a 2K display that is in portrait mode...." Read more
    "...Worked one minute, the next minute, dark screen. No logo at power-on, no front panel display...." Read more
    "...wide viewing angle, - bright picture, - very detailed letters even with small fonts - easy to read, -..." Read more
    "...The iMac had a super clear ,very bright screen that I really liked...." Read more
    17 customers mention compatibility, 10 positive, 7 negative17 customers mention "Compatibility"10 positive7 negative
    Customers have mixed experiences with the monitor's compatibility, with some reporting it works well with Mac computers, while others mention issues with specific devices like Roku and PS4.
    "I use this monitor in my home office. It works well with my work laptop and my home computers ." Read more
    "...Loose HDMI Connection - In the first 30 minutes, I started noticing flickers...." Read more
    "...the money, it seems to be a really good quality monitor that offers good connectivity and great on-screen performance for the specs...." Read more
    "...This device is not compatible, I've even purchased a 4k 2.0 HDMI adaptor as well as a HDMI/DP converter, None of which has worked...." Read more

    5.0 out of 5 stars

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    Top Product!
    I am one day in and already love this screen I have been around mac retinas a lot and love this screen just as much, windows or MACos it looks beautiful. Those that say it is massive, really it is not no next strain for me Power BI creators or visual folks will love this product and at $320 is a complete steal. I have 2 Dell 27 inch 4k as well and almost want to throw those and buy two more of these! Easy easy set up, even easier than Dell Buy it, it’s a no brainer with return policy also

    Top reviews from the United States

    • J. Barbour
      5 out of 5 stars
      Best value 4K monitor on the market
      Reviewed in the United States on June 15, 2026
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      After 3 days using this monitor, I continue to be amazed how good it is. IMO, it is the best 4K monitor value for the money. The color, contrast and sharpness are excellent. It is a great combination with my M4 MacMini. The monitor allows me to connect up to 3 computers with it's dual HDMI connectors and a DP.

      I love that the OSD buttons are on the front and you can set the menu size to large so you can see it easily. It allows you to turn the power indicator light off while the monitor is in use so the blue LED doesn't distract you. I wish all monitors could do that. Sometimes it is the little things that make a product stand out. This Viewsonic monitor is a good example.

      Read moreRead less
      One person found this helpful

    • G-man
      5 out of 5 stars
      Great Second Monitor
      Reviewed in the United States on December 16, 2025
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I picked this up as a second monitor for my system to extend the display and have some work tabs open while doing other things. The setup was fairly easy and the entire unit seems to be fairly robust. The graphics and color displays seem to be on point. Since I'm a photographer, I did a little color calibration to be sure, but it didn't take much time or work to get things right. The response time for menu entries seems fairly snappy and the system seems easy to navigate. There are lots of port options for HDMI (2), Display Port, Mini Display Port, and one audio out if you don't want to use the built in speakers.

      I'm not much of a PC gamer, so I can't speak to that aspect, but overall, I'm happy with the purchases. For the money, it seems to be a really good quality monitor that offers good connectivity and great on-screen performance for the specs. Seems to be a good value overall.

      Read moreRead less
      3 people found this helpful
      Helpful
      Sending feedback...

      Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again

      Sending feedback...

    • Dan Y.
      5 out of 5 stars
      Solid value for the price.
      Reviewed in the United States on April 11, 2024
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Out of the box this is what you expect from Viewsonic. Solidly built nice brushed metal frame & base not plastic, has a bit of weight to it. Picture quality is very good even running at the lower 2560 x 1440 res, I honestly don't notice a difference running at the higher native 2 & 4K resolutions for my needs and it definitely eases the strain on older video cards. Movie streaming and text applications are sharp, clear and very customizable in the onboard controls. Does take a little playing with setting to find your preference's and there's no real guides to go by, all trial & error.

      It's an easy swap to 2 or 4K in the desktop video controls for movies and the this monitor really delivers for this kind of usage and most streaming formats

      At 60hz it won't dazzle you with higher end gaming at max resolution and again the drop to 2560 x 1440 isn't noticeable except on the newer gen Ultra high requirement games . Currently running back through my old library of action games and this breathes new life to them. Running on a Nvidia GTX 1070 it still performs beyond my expectations.

      My only two negatives are the height is fixed, can't adjust up or down and the field of view is a bit narrow. Sitting straight on it's great, doesn't take a lot of angling off to the side to see color fade.

      Read moreRead less
      11 people found this helpful
      Helpful
      Sending feedback...
      Thank you for your feedback.
      Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again

      Sending feedback...
      Thanks, we'll investigate in the next few days.
      Sorry, We failed to report this review. Please try again
    • Jason M.
      1 out of 5 stars
      Wow. 4K monitor is impressively bad.
      Reviewed in the United States on April 30, 2025
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I have owned two of these, the 2K and the 4K, and I cannot believe they share the same model numbers. The 2K monitor is absolutely fantastic and I am still using it now after 5 years. Perfect regular use computer monitor.

      The 4K version is completely different, and I'm not sure why it shares the same model number. Other than the stand everything else is completely different. The picture is so dull, colors are absolutely horrendous and washed out. Also mine arrived with a vertical line on the screen, so the QC isn't up to par. I'm telling you the colors and picture was so bad, unlike anything I've ever seen before, I decided to take time out of my day to write about it. I wouldn't even buy it for $99. If you are looking for 4K, this is definitely not the one.

      Read moreRead less
      5 people found this helpful
      Helpful

      Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again

    • TechUser
      5 out of 5 stars
      Great Picture. No Issues
      Reviewed in the United States on May 12, 2025
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      I got the 4k model. I bought it used from Amazon for $240. It was like new with no issues. It came in a plain box.

      For business or programming applications the 4k monitor is the best. Don't get a curved screen. With 4k your screen can fit four 1080 p screens.

      Mine has the power & settings buttons on the lower front corner of the display instead of behind the display as pictured. I like it much better with the buttons on the front where it is easy to access. My model was exactly the same as the one pictured. So, I don't know why my buttons were on the front.

      The manual is useless. I had to figure out the settings buttons by experimenting. It wasn't too difficult if you are technically inclined.

      I had a 2 yr old LG 32 in 4k monitor that fell over during the CA earthquake and broke the screen. The Viewsonic has a more stable base and I like the picture better than the LG.

      The LG had a thinner monitor screen than the Viewsonic, but it is not bulky. Unless you look at it from the side all the time you wouldn't notice it. They seemed to weigh about the same.

      I had a Viewsonic around 30 years ago and loved the screen quality back then. So, I bought one now and the quality is still great for business or photo editing applications. I probably wouldn't recommend it for gaming because there are faster monitors available at a much higher cost.

      Read moreRead less
      11 people found this helpful
      Helpful

      Sorry, we failed to record your vote. Please try again

    • Bebobily
      4 out of 5 stars
      Nice, conventional, bland
      Reviewed in the United States on July 9, 2025
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      It is a nice monitor. It's bigger than its predecessor. Text is very clear and it is easier on the eyes. Static, black graphics (the Prime Video homepage for example) are very black. When images start to move, however, that black lightens up considerably. The 2 watt speakers sound exactly like what one would expect 2 watt speakers to sound like. Make room for something else for sound (there is a headphone out jack on the back).

      Unlike the product pictures I've seen online and people are talking about, my array of adjustment buttons (5 + on/off) are on the lower right bottom bezel. Using them is whole 'nother nut.

      As one of the video reviewers stated, the documentation is abysmal. It is actually worse than that. Who has time these days to spend the hours needed to second-guess and decipher the manufacturer's product info? Not me. So I cannot now talk about the various presets that might be a great selling point- and no one else is either. Viewsonic- that's just stupid. And one last thing- are four vesa screws to much to provide? Are your margins that small? What about those margins when I return it as damaged because I had the wrong screws?

      Read moreRead less
      5 people found this helpful
      Helpful

    • Mr. Bun
      5 out of 5 stars
      Don't let the negative reviews get in the way.
      Reviewed in the United States on August 24, 2023
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Display is sharp, bright, and color is perfect. This monitor is paired with a 2K display that is in portrait mode. Using Nvidia Desktop Manager or Fancy Zones as part of Windows Power toys I can split the the display into 4 - 1080p displays, smaller ones for email, etc... Or use the whole display for video and photo work. Some of the comments said the stand was not stable. I don't have that problem. The stand appears to be cast aluminum, very attractive. I put it together, and used loctite blue on the threads of the screws, and have had zero vibration issues. Very pleased with this display. Typically I prefer Benq or ViewSonic displays, and the price and quality is perfect for my professional use.

      Read moreRead less
      7 people found this helpful

    • Kindle Customer
      3 out of 5 stars
      Stand problems! NSFW. Nice screen, good appearance, wonderful engineering on the desktop stand.
      Reviewed in the United States on November 22, 2025
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Uh, turns out I was wrong bout the wonderful engineering on the stand. Monitor easily scoots off the stand after a few weeks. And I had to buy a piece of wood to go under the stand to elevate it correctly. Go back to older stands that could raise monitor up and down. Nice screen, good appearance, wonderful engineering on the desktop stand. Four minor hickies or this would have been a five start review. (1) The plastic screws on the stand were easy to damage (do they need to be plastic to get the good picture?). (2) Stand doesn't raise up or down like my previous ViewSonic screens. (3) Terrible manual - an old guy with poor mechanical skills will have trouble figuring how to attach the stand to the screen. (4) Print on the manual was so small that I had to get a magnifying glass to read it (how much does the manual add to the cost? don't know).

      Read moreRead less

    • Elias
      5 out of 5 stars
      Viewsonic VX3276-4K-MHD (32 Zoll, 4K UHD)
      Reviewed in Germany on December 13, 2020
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase
      Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
      Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

      Hab nach einem guten 4K Monitor für mein MacBook Pro (Mid 2014) gesucht und mit dem Viewsonic VX3276-4K-MHD (32 Zoll, 4K UHD) einen gefunden.

      + Design / Material / Konstruktion:

      Auf jeden Fall einer der coolsten Displays, die ich bisher verwendet hab. Durch den schmalen Rand kommt die Größe richtig zur Geltung, Der Rahmen ist Oben und an den Seiten effektiv 9 mm dick. Durch den schwarzen Bildschirmrand und der silbernen Fassung optisch jedoch viel dünner. Eine kleine rechteckige LED rechts unten leuchtet beim Betrieb blau, im Standby orange. Den Standfuß hab ich ehrlich gesagt nie ausprobiert (hab den Bildschirm direkt an die Wand gehängt), sieht aber sehr hochwertig aus und liegt auch schwer in der Hand. Der Monitor ist an der dicksten Stelle etwa 4,5 cm breit, sodass er sehr nah an die Wand montiert werden kann. Die Kabelanschlüsse befinden sich auf der Unterseite und etwas vertieft, sodass sowohl von Vorne, als auch von der Seite nur die Kabel sichtbar sind, nicht deren Stecker. Außerdem ist in dieser Vertiefung genug Platz, um die Kabel zur gewünschten Stelle zu führen - sehr minimalistisch also, gefällt mir gut!

      + Funktion:

      Das IPS Panel sieht super aus. Bin begeistert von den Farben und der Schärfe. Auch der matte Display ist genau so, wie ich ihn mir vorgestellt hab. Selbst bei schönem Wetter, wenn die Sonne voll ins Zimmer scheint, spiegelt nichts. Auch ist die Bildschirmhelligkeit in einer solchen Situation immernoch sehr gut. Der Monitor besitzt viele Einstellmöglichkeiten, die sich alle über die 6 Tasten auf der Rückseite bedienen lassen. Dadurch, dass man diese Tasten nicht sieht, sondern nur erfühlt, ist die Bedienung etwas umständlich, jedoch muss man dort im Normalfall selten was ändern. Ich hab einige Einstellungen und auch die Game-Modi ausprobiert, komme aber immer wieder auf die Standardeinstellung zurück, diese ist bereits wunderbar kalibriert!

      Wenn man nicht gerade das Ohr an den Monitor legt, ist er völlig lautlos. Selbst wenn der Computer mal nicht lüftet, ist das Gerät absolut geräuschlos, konnte kein Surren oder ähnliches feststellen. Die verbauten Boxen sind absoluter Schrott. Selbst Systemtöne werden mit einem leichten Rauschen ausgegeben, die Tonqualität von den Lautsprechern von Smartphone oder Laptop sind um Welten besser - aber ganz ehrlich, wen interessiert der Ton bei einem externen Monitor?

      Nach dem Einschalten erscheint kurz das Viewsonic-Logo in Farbe in der Mitte des Bildschirms, dann erst das übertragene Bild. Zum Hochfahren braucht der Monitor insgesamt nur 5 Sekunden.

      + Zubehör / Anschlussmöglichkeiten:

      Beiliegend ist das Netzkabel und ein HDMI-Kabel. Das Netzteil ist im Monitor verbaut.

      Auch die VESA-Kmpatibilität ist sehr gut - die 4 Gewinde für die Schrauben (mit einem Abstand von 100 x 100 mm) liegen auf der hinteresten Ebene des Monitors, es müssen also keine Abstandhalter verwendet werden. Auf der Unterseite befinden sich neben dem Anschluss des Netzkabels links des weitern 2x HDMI Ports, 1x Mini-DisplayPort, 1x DisplayPort, 1x Audio Out rechts.

      Fazit: Top 4K-Monitor! Kaufen!

      So und jetzt zum Thema mit den 4K bei 60Hz an einem alten Mac:

      Um mit dem MacBook Pro (Mid 2014) einen 4K-Monitor bei 60Hz zu betreiben gibt es nur eine einzige Möglichkeit - über ein Mini-DisplayPort zu DisplayPort Kabel !!!!!!!!!! Diese Kabel gibt es von verschiedensten Herstellern in vielen unterschiedlichen Längen - ich persönlich verwende eines von iVANKY um 10 Euro.

      Auf den Bildern sind die beiden Grafikkarten des MacBooks Intel Iris Pro und NIVIDIA GeForce GT 750M zu sehen. Das Bild des Monitors läuft bei mir automatisch auf der NIVIDIA-Karte. Seit ich dieses Kabel verwende, gab es bei den 60Hz keinen einzigen Aussetzer mehr. Ein weiterer Vorteil beim Verwenden des Mini-DisplayPorts (bzw. Thunderbolt-Anschluss) ist, dass sich das MacBook die Größen und Positionen der geöffneten Programmfenster auf dem Monitor merkt, das klappt sonst nicht.

      Selbstverständlich ist es auch möglich, das Bild direkt über das HDMI-Kabel oder einen Thunderbolt auf HDMI Adapter zu übertragen, jedoch nur bei 30Hz. Ich würde absolut niemandem empfehlen, den Bildschirm bei nur 30Hz zu verwenden. Man kann vieles schön reden, aber das ist einfach nur unerträglich mit der Zeit. Auch wenn man den Monitor nicht fürs Gaming verwendet, sondern nur zum Arbeiten, ruckelt der Mauszeiger, das Scrollen von Websites ist anstrengend, Videos sehen furchtbar aus, alles wirkt verzögert - tut euch das nicht an und investiert die paar Euro für das richtige Kabel.

      Read moreRead less
      Elias
      5 out of 5 stars
      Viewsonic VX3276-4K-MHD (32 Zoll, 4K UHD)
      Reviewed in Germany on December 13, 2020
      Style: 32-Inch 4K
      Verified Purchase

      Hab nach einem guten 4K Monitor für mein MacBook Pro (Mid 2014) gesucht und mit dem Viewsonic VX3276-4K-MHD (32 Zoll, 4K UHD) einen gefunden.

      + Design / Material / Konstruktion:

      Auf jeden Fall einer der coolsten Displays, die ich bisher verwendet hab. Durch den schmalen Rand kommt die Größe richtig zur Geltung, Der Rahmen ist Oben und an den Seiten effektiv 9 mm dick. Durch den schwarzen Bildschirmrand und der silbernen Fassung optisch jedoch viel dünner. Eine kleine rechteckige LED rechts unten leuchtet beim Betrieb blau, im Standby orange. Den Standfuß hab ich ehrlich gesagt nie ausprobiert (hab den Bildschirm direkt an die Wand gehängt), sieht aber sehr hochwertig aus und liegt auch schwer in der Hand. Der Monitor ist an der dicksten Stelle etwa 4,5 cm breit, sodass er sehr nah an die Wand montiert werden kann. Die Kabelanschlüsse befinden sich auf der Unterseite und etwas vertieft, sodass sowohl von Vorne, als auch von der Seite nur die Kabel sichtbar sind, nicht deren Stecker. Außerdem ist in dieser Vertiefung genug Platz, um die Kabel zur gewünschten Stelle zu führen - sehr minimalistisch also, gefällt mir gut!

      + Funktion:

      Das IPS Panel sieht super aus. Bin begeistert von den Farben und der Schärfe. Auch der matte Display ist genau so, wie ich ihn mir vorgestellt hab. Selbst bei schönem Wetter, wenn die Sonne voll ins Zimmer scheint, spiegelt nichts. Auch ist die Bildschirmhelligkeit in einer solchen Situation immernoch sehr gut. Der Monitor besitzt viele Einstellmöglichkeiten, die sich alle über die 6 Tasten auf der Rückseite bedienen lassen. Dadurch, dass man diese Tasten nicht sieht, sondern nur erfühlt, ist die Bedienung etwas umständlich, jedoch muss man dort im Normalfall selten was ändern. Ich hab einige Einstellungen und auch die Game-Modi ausprobiert, komme aber immer wieder auf die Standardeinstellung zurück, diese ist bereits wunderbar kalibriert!

      Wenn man nicht gerade das Ohr an den Monitor legt, ist er völlig lautlos. Selbst wenn der Computer mal nicht lüftet, ist das Gerät absolut geräuschlos, konnte kein Surren oder ähnliches feststellen. Die verbauten Boxen sind absoluter Schrott. Selbst Systemtöne werden mit einem leichten Rauschen ausgegeben, die Tonqualität von den Lautsprechern von Smartphone oder Laptop sind um Welten besser - aber ganz ehrlich, wen interessiert der Ton bei einem externen Monitor?

Auf der Unterseite befinden sich neben dem Anschluss des Netzkabels links des weitern 2x HDMI Ports, 1x Mini-DisplayPort, 1x DisplayPort, 1x Audio Out rechts.

      Fazit: Top 4K-Monitor! Kaufen!

      So und jetzt zum Thema mit den 4K bei 60Hz an einem alten Mac:

      Um mit dem MacBook Pro (Mid 2014) einen 4K-Monitor bei 60Hz zu betreiben gibt es nur eine einzige Möglichkeit - über ein Mini-DisplayPort zu DisplayPort Kabel !!!!!!!!!! Diese Kabel gibt es von verschiedensten Herstellern in vielen unterschiedlichen Längen - ich persönlich verwende eines von iVANKY um 10 Euro.

      Auf den Bildern sind die beiden Grafikkarten des MacBooks Intel Iris Pro und NIVIDIA GeForce GT 750M zu sehen. Das Bild des Monitors läuft bei mir automatisch auf der NIVIDIA-Karte. Seit ich dieses Kabel verwende, gab es bei den 60Hz keinen einzigen Aussetzer mehr. Ein weiterer Vorteil beim Verwenden des Mini-DisplayPorts (bzw. Thunderbolt-Anschluss) ist, dass sich das MacBook die Größen und Positionen der geöffneten Programmfenster auf dem Monitor merkt, das klappt sonst nicht.

      Selbstverständlich ist es auch möglich, das Bild direkt über das HDMI-Kabel oder einen Thunderbolt auf HDMI Adapter zu übertragen, jedoch nur bei 30Hz. Ich würde absolut niemandem empfehlen, den Bildschirm bei nur 30Hz zu verwenden. Man kann vieles schön reden, aber das ist einfach nur unerträglich mit der Zeit. Auch wenn man den Monitor nicht fürs Gaming verwendet, sondern nur zum Arbeiten, ruckelt der Mauszeiger, das Scrollen von Websites ist anstrengend, Videos sehen furchtbar aus, alles wirkt verzögert - tut euch das nicht an und investiert die paar Euro für das richtige Kabel.
